overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during a heavy acid rain storm with a distinctive yellow-toxic atmosphere. The character travels from an elevated train track walkway, crosses a street to a food stand area, then continues along a narrow sidewalk under an overpass. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, neon signage, and industrial urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway alongside train tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway next to train tracks in heavy acid rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the same walkway path

entered.detail: black metal railing fence separating walkway from train tracks below
multiple train tracks visible through the fence with gravel bed
large metal power transmission tower with multiple cables
rain-slicked concrete pedestrian path with puddles reflecting lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated pedestrian walkway during a heavy acid rain storm. A metal safety fence runs along the left side overlooking railway tracks below, while electrical pylons and distant city lights pierce through the yellow-hazed atmosphere. Another pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level at intersection
crossing the wet asphalt road toward commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: descending to street level and crossing the road toward the FOODSCAPE building

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' on green building facade
tall traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
tall palm trees lining the street
rain-soaked black asphalt road with reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the walkway to street level, entering a wide urban intersection. The red neon 'FOODSCAPE' sign becomes visible on the right as the character crosses the wet asphalt. Palm trees and traffic lights dot the scene while sparse pedestrians move through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food stand with outdoor seating area

events.description: entering the covered walkway area of the FOODSCAPE food stand

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered awning of the food stand past outdoor seating tables

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food counter inside the stand

entered.detail: green and teal building front with service windows and signage
blue plastic chairs and small tables arranged under the awning
wall covered in colorful graffiti murals and posters
overhead roof structure providing shelter from the rain

segments.scene_description: The character enters the semi-covered area of the FOODSCAPE food stand, passing blue plastic outdoor seating chairs. The left wall features vibrant graffiti murals, while neon signs illuminate the service counter where a vendor stands. The overhead awning provides shelter from the acid rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk under elevated highway with concrete walls

events.description: exiting covered food stand to narrow sidewalk under overpass
cars passing by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk next to a high concrete wall under the overpass

entered.detail: tall plain concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
massive concrete overpass and support columns overhead
red and white striped plastic barriers near the wall
dark colored sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character exits the food stand area into a narrow, enclosed sidewalk running alongside a tall concrete retaining wall. The massive elevated highway structure looms overhead, providing shelter from the rain. Construction barriers line the wall while cars occasionally pass on the street to the left, and the yellow-hazed atmosphere continues down the dimly lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a toxic, rain-soaked urban environment that shifts from an elevated walkway down into the sheltered corridors of a neon-lit city. It begins on a narrow pedestrian bridge overlooking railway tracks, where electrical pylons and distant lights pierce through a heavy yellow haze. As the character descends to street level, the scene opens into a wide intersection of wet asphalt, passing palm trees and traffic lights before approaching the glowing red neon of a Foodscape stand. The camera then moves under the stand's protective awning, passing blue plastic chairs and vibrant graffiti murals that illuminate the service counter. Finally, the view shifts as the character exits the food area and enters a dim, enclosed sidewalk, where a massive concrete highway overpass looms overhead and construction barriers line the path through the persistent acidic rain.
